erinoverview.bio: Erin sets IT standards and manages information supply chains at Coco Pharmaceuticals. She handles data requests from across the business and focuses on how information flows between systems — making her the natural starting point for understanding the full metadata landscape.
highlights: Full view across all Explorer tabs
ISC tab — information supply chains and data flows
Governance zones, glossary, and data asset standards

peterprofile.bio: Peter assesses and reports on data quality across Coco's repositories. He automates quality rules and profilers to track steady improvement in data trustworthiness, and supplies Erin Overview with detailed evidence about information quality status.
highlights: Data Design tab — data structures and quality rules
Glossary tab — standard business term definitions
Governance tab — data quality metrics and stewardship

calliequartile.bio: Callie works with clinical and research data. She relies on the glossary for standard definitions, data design for understanding data structures, and lineage to trust her datasets.
highlights: Data Design tab — data structures and schemas
Glossary tab — standard business terms
ISC tab — data lineage and provenance

garygeeke.bio: Gary handles day-to-day IT operations and automation at Coco. He uses Egeria to maintain a systems inventory, track infrastructure auditability, and ensure deployed assets are properly catalogued and compliant.
highlights: Type System tab — Egeria's open metadata types
Governance tab — compliance rules and audit status
Digital Products — deployed system assets inventory

ivorpadlock.bio: Ivor is responsible for both physical and information security at Coco. He uses Egeria to track accountability for data protection, understand how security classifications are applied across assets, and automate safeguards.
highlights: Governance tab — security classifications and zones
Perspectives tab — security viewpoints
Glossary — privacy-sensitive term definitions

faithbroker.bio: Faith leads HR and serves as Coco's privacy officer. She monitors regulatory compliance, tracks organisational roles and responsibilities, and works to automate compliance requirements into IT systems.
highlights: Perspectives tab — organisational roles and teams
Governance tab — privacy and compliance controls
Glossary — HR and regulatory term definitions

pollytasker.bio: Polly leads a small IT development team tackling system integrations and enhancements. She uses Egeria to understand data dependencies, track project metadata, and navigate the complexity of coordinating work across siloed systems.
highlights: Solution Architect tab — project-linked blueprints
ISC tab — data flows for project deliverables
Perspectives tab — project stakeholder views

tomtally.bio: Tom manages Coco's financial accounts and reporting. He relies on Egeria to trace data lineage for regulatory submissions and verify that financial figures are derived from trustworthy, governed sources.
highlights: ISC tab — lineage for financial reporting data
Glossary — finance and accounting term definitions
Data Design — financial data structures and schemas

lemmiestage.bio: Lemmie is Coco's principal DevOps engineer, specialising in containerised deployments and automation. He uses Egeria to track deployed system assets and understand the security profile of what is running in production.
highlights: Type System tab — deployed infrastructure asset types
Governance tab — security and compliance for deployments
ISC tab — system pipeline flows and dependencies

juleskeeper.bio: Jules is Coco's Chief Data Officer, leading the transformation toward data-driven decision making. She focuses on strategy, governance, and establishing data as a core business asset across the enterprise.
highlights: Solution Architect tab — blueprints and governance frameworks
Governance tab — organisation-wide policies and drivers
Perspectives tab — executive data strategy viewpoints

stewfaster.bio: Stew manages Coco's manufacturing plant and oversees production lines. He uses Egeria to understand data flows relevant to manufacturing operations and track the quality of operational data feeding into production decisions.
highlights: ISC tab — operational data flows and lineage
Data Design — manufacturing dataset schemas
Governance tab — operational data quality rules
